name: AWS
description: Nodes and runners for Amazon Web Services
author: Snipet AI

nodeTypes.name: S3 Put Object
nodeTypes.description: Upload an object to an S3 bucket

inputWidget.label: Bucket Name
inputWidget.description: The name of the S3 bucket to upload the object to

inputWidget.label: Object Key
inputWidget.description: The key of the S3 object to upload

inputWidget.label: File
inputWidget.description: The file to upload to the S3 bucket

inputWidget.label: Content Type
inputWidget.description: The content type of the object to upload

nodeTypes.name: S3 Get Object
nodeTypes.description: Download an object from an S3 bucket

inputWidget.label: Bucket Name
inputWidget.description: The name of the S3 bucket to download the object from

inputWidget.label: Object Key
inputWidget.description: The key of the S3 object to download

inputWidget.label: Function Name or ARN
inputWidget.description: The name or ARN of the Lambda function to invoke

inputs.name: payload
inputs.description: JSON payload sent to the function

outputs.name: statusCode
outputs.description: HTTP status code from the invocation

nodeTypes.name: DynamoDB Put Item
nodeTypes.description: Insert or replace an item in a DynamoDB table

inputWidget.label: Table Name
inputWidget.description: The name of the DynamoDB table to put the item in

nodeTypes.name: DynamoDB Get Item
nodeTypes.description: Retrieve an item from a DynamoDB table

inputWidget.label: Table Name
inputWidget.description: The name of the DynamoDB table to get the item from

outputs.name: item
outputs.description: Retrieved item, or null if not found

nodeTypes.name: SQS Send Message
nodeTypes.description: Send a message to an SQS queue

inputWidget.label: Queue URL
inputWidget.description: The URL of the SQS queue to send the message to

inputWidget.label: Message Body
inputWidget.description: The body of the message to send to the SQS queue

inputWidget.label: Message Group ID
inputWidget.description: The group ID of the message to send to the SQS queue

nodeTypes.name: SNS Publish
nodeTypes.description: Publish a message to an SNS topic

inputWidget.label: Topic ARN
inputWidget.description: The ARN of the SNS topic to publish the message to

inputWidget.label: Message Body
inputWidget.description: The body of the message to publish to the SNS topic

inputWidget.label: Message Subject
inputWidget.description: The subject of the message to publish to the SNS topic

nodeTypes.name: SES Send Email
nodeTypes.description: Send an email using Amazon SES

inputWidget.label: Sender Email Address
inputWidget.description: The verified sender email address to send the email from

inputWidget.label: Recipient Email Address
inputWidget.description: The email address of the recipient to send the email to

inputWidget.label: Email Subject
inputWidget.description: The subject of the email to send

inputWidget.label: Email Body
inputWidget.description: The body of the email to send

nodeTypes.name: Secrets Manager Get Secret
nodeTypes.description: Retrieve a secret value from AWS Secrets Manager

inputWidget.label: Secret Name or ARN
inputWidget.description: The name or ARN of the secret to retrieve

configs.name: AWS Credentials
configs.description: AWS access credentials and default region
